appraisal.description: A black chapel candle whose wick gives off heat without flame and smells faintly of signed names.

clues.result: Melt lines run upward toward the wick instead of down the candle.
UV light reveals thumbprints circling the base like a congregation.
The candle grows hotter after the lamp is turned away.

appraisal.wrong_handling_consequence: If preserved or sold, the wick lights whenever a name is spoken near the shop.

generation.concept_prompt: Local prototype concept for Black Wax Candle.
generation.model_prompt: Local procedural prototype model for Black Wax Candle.
